title: Claude Fable 5 & Apple’s NVIDIA deal
summary: IBM Technology's Mixture of Experts podcast discusses Anthropic's Claude Fable 5 release, its tier routing system, Apple's shift away from on-device AI to partner with NVIDIA for cloud compute announced at WWDC 2026, and whether AI models can detect sarcasm.
writeup: This Mixture of Experts episode from IBM Technology covers Anthropic's Claude Fable 5 release and its tier routing system, which directs requests across model tiers. The panel also examines Apple's reported shift away from on-device AI toward a partnership with NVIDIA for cloud compute, announced at WWDC 2026. A third segment considers whether AI models can detect sarcasm. The discussion connects these threads to broader topics including routing, compute infrastructure, and multimodal learning.
